## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

What would you like Self Ershov Memory to do?

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about?

## Why this matters

Who benefits and how?

## Success criteria

How would we know this is done well?

## Scope

Check every box that applies:

- [ ] docs only
- [ ] tests needed
- [ ] CLI change
- [ ] artifact format change
- [ ] validation / safety change
- [ ] writeback behavior change
